KÜMELEME

Sıla Alayı

2026-01-02

KÜMELEME

library(haven)
library(dendextend)
## 
## ---------------------
## Welcome to dendextend version 1.19.0
## Type citation('dendextend') for how to cite the package.

## 
## Attaching package: 'dendextend'
## The following object is masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     cutree
library(readxl)
kumeveri <- read_excel("C:/Users/admin/Desktop/kumeveri.xlsx")
View(kumeveri)

Hiyerarşik Kümeleme

ka <- kumeveri[, c("Signals", "Yield", "SpeedControl", "NightDrive", 
                        "RoadSigns", "SteerControl", "MirrorUsage", 
                        "Confidence", "Parking", "TheoryTest")]
d <- dist(ka, method = "euclidean") 
fit <- hclust(d, method="average") 
dend<-as.dendrogram(fit) # Dendogram çizimi
plot(dend)

plot(color_branches(dend, k=4))
## Loading required namespace: colorspace

K Means

library(factoextra)
## Zorunlu paket yükleniyor: ggplot2
## Welcome! Want to learn more? See two factoextra-related books at https://goo.gl/ve3WBa
fviz_nbclust(ka, kmeans, method = "wss")
## Warning: The `size` argument of `element_line()` is deprecated as of ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use the `linewidth` argument instead.
## ℹ The deprecated feature was likely used in the ggpubr package.
##   Please report the issue at <https://github.com/kassambara/ggpubr/issues>.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
## Warning: The `size` argument of `element_rect()` is deprecated as of ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use the `linewidth` argument instead.
## ℹ The deprecated feature was likely used in the ggpubr package.
##   Please report the issue at <https://github.com/kassambara/ggpubr/issues>.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## ℹ The deprecated feature was likely used in the ggpubr package.
##   Please report the issue at <https://github.com/kassambara/ggpubr/issues>.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.

fviz_nbclust(ka, kmeans, method = "silhouette")

km.res <- kmeans(ka, centers = 4, iter.max = 20, nstart = 25, algorithm = "Lloyd")
## Warning: did not converge in 20 iterations
# 3. Final Cluster Centers (Nihai Küme Merkezleri)
# t() fonksiyonu tabloyu SPSS'teki gibi dikey (değişkenler solda, kümeler üstte) hale getirir.
final_centers <- t(km.res$centers)
print(final_centers)
##                     1        2        3        4
## Signals      54.91345 59.43390 40.90536 33.48577
## Yield        52.33855 59.34854 45.52036 24.14500
## SpeedControl 56.66764 58.45951 41.42000 32.20769
## NightDrive   52.78582 58.92463 41.46393 32.91385
## RoadSigns    56.01091 59.35976 36.65554 33.40462
## SteerControl 53.65073 59.41122 43.48500 29.27231
## MirrorUsage  58.81564 57.92244 42.07464 32.87154
## Confidence   55.89400 54.98390 43.53000 28.56577
## Parking      55.92945 61.24268 42.24143 32.80077
## TheoryTest   87.25564 56.06000 60.52196 82.28269
library(cluster)
clusplot(ka, km.res$cluster, main='2D representation of the Cluster solution',
         color=TRUE, shade=TRUE,
         labels=2, lines=0)

#ya da bu fonksiyonla Temel Bileşenlere Göre
fviz_cluster(km.res, data = ka, palette = "jco",
             ggtheme = theme_minimal())

ka$cluster<-km.res$cluster # Veriye gözlemin atandigi kumenin eklenmesi
ka$cluster<-as.factor(ka$cluster)
library(rstatix)
## 
## Attaching package: 'rstatix'
## The following object is masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter
signals_aov <- aov(Signals ~ cluster, data = ka)
summary(signals_aov)
##              Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)    
## cluster       3  16254    5418   32.16 <2e-16 ***
## Residuals   174  29309     168                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
yield_aov <- aov(Yield ~ cluster, data = ka)
summary(yield_aov)
##              Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)    
## cluster       3  21438    7146   49.98 <2e-16 ***
## Residuals   174  24877     143                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
speed_aov <- aov(SpeedControl ~ cluster, data = ka)
summary(speed_aov)
##              Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)    
## cluster       3  17437    5812   39.73 <2e-16 ***
## Residuals   174  25456     146                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
night_aov <- aov(NightDrive ~ cluster, data = ka)
summary(night_aov)
##              Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)    
## cluster       3  14450    4817   39.78 <2e-16 ***
## Residuals   174  21066     121                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
signs_aov <- aov(RoadSigns ~ cluster, data = ka)
summary(signs_aov)
##              Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)    
## cluster       3  21500    7167   43.95 <2e-16 ***
## Residuals   174  28371     163                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
steer_aov <- aov(SteerControl ~ cluster, data = ka)
summary(steer_aov)
##              Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)    
## cluster       3  17347    5782   41.01 <2e-16 ***
## Residuals   174  24533     141                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
mirror_aov <- aov(MirrorUsage ~ cluster, data = ka)
summary(mirror_aov)
##              Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)    
## cluster       3  17958    5986    40.8 <2e-16 ***
## Residuals   174  25530     147                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
conf_aov <- aov(Confidence ~ cluster, data = ka)
summary(conf_aov)
##              Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)    
## cluster       3  16359    5453   34.11 <2e-16 ***
## Residuals   174  27817     160                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
parking_aov <- aov(Parking ~ cluster, data = ka)
summary(parking_aov)
##              Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)    
## cluster       3  18128    6043   45.53 <2e-16 ***
## Residuals   174  23094     133                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
theory_aov <- aov(TheoryTest ~ cluster, data = ka)
summary(theory_aov)
##              Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)    
## cluster       3  33142   11047   70.25 <2e-16 ***
## Residuals   174  27363     157                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
